understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver any pushable object—either the currently selected controllable piece or any pushable block—to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate specified in level.target_x, winning the scenario upon success or failing if the step budget runs out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece exactly one STEP (3 pixels) in the chosen direction unless blocked; pushing occurs if a pushable object is adjacent in that direction, moving it along with the piece; walls and boundaries block movement variably, with some allowing direct movement but blocking pushes or vice versa, requiring trial to discern exact behaviors from observations like semantic_grid and blocked hints.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Moving right will push the adjacent block 'pb' from x=3 to x=6, reaching the target_x=6 and winning if the push succeeds against the wall.
